cases.scenario_label: Indexing finishes a partial-shard pass while the window is foreground and focused. The durable row, status item, and toast deliver in-app; the redundant OS notification is dropped but stays a visible receipt.

stale_or_undelivered_reason.reason_label: Foreground window focused; in-product surface used.

cases.scenario_label: Indexing reports progress while the user is presenting. The toast and OS notification are suppressed as audience-visible surfaces; the durable row and status item still deliver.
A restore completes while its target object is still being rebuilt and no window is foreground. The reopen announces a truthful placeholder; the durable row, status item, and toast deliver.
A download-and-install update finishes while the device is locked. The lock-screen summary and OS notification deliver summary-first; durable truth is preserved for the return.

An AI apply request needs approval with a screen reader active and the window focused. A navigable durable surface is present, the announcement is required, and the redundant OS notification is dropped.

stale_or_undelivered_reason.reason_label: Foreground window focused; in-product surface used.

cases.scenario_label: A provider sync stalls because its token expired while no window is foreground and no companion is paired. The reopen requires revalidation; the OS notification delivers; the companion push is not attempted but stays a visible receipt.

A managed policy change fires under admin suppression while no window is foreground. The banner, OS notification, and lock-screen summary are suppressed by policy; the durable status item still delivers so the user has a path back.

stale_or_undelivered_reason.reason_label: Lock-screen render forbidden by privacy class.

cases.scenario_label: A remote agent reconnects while the user is away from the desktop with a reachable companion and an unlocked device. The companion push and OS notification deliver summary-first; the lock-screen summary is not applicable because the device is unlocked.

stale_or_undelivered_reason.reason_label: Device not locked; lock-screen summary not applicable.

cases.scenario_label: A managed-workspace alert fires where policy forbids companion fanout. The companion push is suppressed by policy; durable truth still delivers and the suppression stays an inspectable receipt.

stale_or_undelivered_reason.reason_label: Companion fanout blocked by managed policy.

cases.scenario_label: A classroom session follows a presenter with a reachable companion. The toast, OS notification, and companion push are suppressed while the audience-visible overlay is active; the durable row and status item still deliver.

An indexer warning fires four times in quick succession while the window is foreground but unfocused. The first emission delivers; emissions two through four coalesce on every surface while the reopen target stays stable.

A provider sync completes during quiet hours with a reachable companion and no window foreground. The durable row delivers; the toast, OS notification, and companion push are held; the companion handoff is recorded as held truth.

drift_drills.drill_label: A surface is repointed at a generic home view instead of the outcome's single reopen target.
A lock-screen summary is forced visible even though the payload class forbids lock-screen rendering.
A deduped repeat is re-delivered, which would inflate the badge above the single deduped durable item.
A toast held by quiet hours is upgraded back to delivered, breaking the quiet-hours hold.
